title: Manifest Printing Utility
description: The 'lib/output' directory houses the 'ManifestPrinter.java' utility, aiding in debugging and monitoring. It reads manifest files, displaying their contents via command-line arguments. This utility, adhering to a utility pattern, outputs diagnostics and I/O statistics, supporting the main output process with ancillary functions.

This utility, adhering to a utility pattern, outputs diagnostics and I/O statistics, supporting the main output process with ancillary functions.
